scripts.test: npm run check:no-secrets && npm run test:core && npm run test:modules && npm run test:config && npm run test:telemetry
scripts.test:core: TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js startup.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js auth.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js quoteUtils.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js symbolUtils.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js trade.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js predictorWarmup.test.js
scripts.test:modules: TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js modules/orderExecution.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js modules/orderbookMetrics.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js modules/entryMarketDataEval.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js modules/entryMarketDataContext.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js modules/marketDataCache.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js modules/entryUniversePolicy.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js modules/tradeGuards.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js modules/quotes.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js modules/storagePaths.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js modules/entryScanHeartbeat.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js modules/startupTruthSummary.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js modules/entryTelemetryShape.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js modules/universeCap.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js modules/warmupReadiness.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js modules/concurrencyGuard.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js modules/entryProbability.test.js
scripts.test:config: TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js config/runtimeConfig.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js config/validateEnv.test.js && TEST_LOG_LEVEL=quiet node -r ./test/quietConsole.js config/liveDefaults.test.js
